displayTitle: Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows #5
synopsis: Stormtrooper Hock sabotages the remnant Separatists from the inside as they defend against Darth Vader's advancing forces, and fights for his life against a figure from his past. At Vader's side, Hock witnesses firsthand the power and ruthlessness of the man-machine he has followed into battle!
title: Darth Vader and the Cry of Shadows #5
